title: ネバー・ギブ・アップ・ワガハイ！

text_block_list.text:
After training, Tokai Teio and I are preparing to
head back.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Oof, I'm tuckered out. I got so into my training
today, I think I might've pushed myself too hard.
choice_data_list: Make sure you get some proper rest at home.
Make sure you get some proper rest at home.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I will! I'll take a shower and... huh?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Heya, Prez! Whatcha doin'?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's you, Teio. I was on my way to inspect the
tracks in preparation for the next Fan Fest.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Inspect the tracks? At this hour? And you're all
alone?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I know! Let me lend a hand! If it's me and you,
Prez, we'll finish this up in a flash. ♪

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I appreciate the offer... but you say this just as
you've finished training. Are you sure you're not
overextending yourself?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I'm all good, no probs here! Right, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Don't wooorry! I'll be fine! All right, let's knock
this out!

With Tokai Teio all fired up, her words prove
true, and they finish the inspection in no time at
all.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Phew! I'm done taking all the measurements!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I applaud you, Teio. Thanks to you, I predict
things will end a lot earlier than I expected.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You can head back to your dorm. I'll take care of
the rest.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Huh? You mean there's more to do than
measurements?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
All that's left is to conduct a test run to get a
reference for timing, but I won't ask more of you
now. You're clearly exhausted.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: But... but! Hrngh...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I know! Wait right there! I'll be right back!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ta-daaa! Sorry for the wait! I've got the solution
right here!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Your signature racewear? Why have you come
wearing that?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Cause I said I'd help you, Prez. And I don't go
back on my word.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
No way am I gonna leave you hanging now,
midway through! That would suck!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Once I have my signature racewear on, that
means I'm never giving up!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I can't lose when I'm wearing this! Watch me, I'm
gonna run this whole thing right now!

Tokai Teio clears the track with remarkable form,
as if instantly cured of her fatigue!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Phew! Did you see that, Prez? I told you I could
do it!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That was splendid, Teio! I caught every
pertinacious step.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... It appears your words hold truth. Your
racewear does impart a certain power to you.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, that's right! And you know what that
means?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
No matter the race, I'm gonna win! Even if it's
against you, Prez.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hm... is that so? Well, I say time is of the essence.
How do you feel about having a scrimmage
tomorrow?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I've had to decline many of your invitations due
to my busy schedule, but this time I am able to
extend an invitation of my own.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Huh, a scrimmage?! Well, I'm happy you asked,
but...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Sorry—I think I'll pass this time! I'd rather wait 'til I
can race you on the big stage.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Man... Now I'm really tired. I'm gonna head back! Let's go, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
"The big stage," huh? Considering your growth
through training, I'd say there's some bite behind
your bark.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If you keep up your diligent efforts, the future
will be yours to make. I suppose I mustn't let my
guard down... haha!

Tokai Teio succeeds in helping out Symboli
Rudolf. However...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: No, that's not it! Aaagh... What have I done?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Just as Prez finally invited me to a scrimmage!
choice_data_list: Don't you want to face her on the big stage?
Don't you want to face her on the big stage?

If you want to contend with her, preparation is
key!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Just as Prez finally invited me to a scrimmage!
choice_data_list: Don't you want to face her on the big stage?
Don't you want to face her on the big stage?

If you want to contend with her, preparation is
key!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yeah, but...
choice_data_list: You're going to have to make it there first.
You're going to have to make it there first.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Oh... that's right! First off is getting to where Prez
is at!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
All right! Now I'm pumped up! Let's make it there
together, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
That's true. I said I wouldn't lose, but I can't win
without some serious practice first.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ah... I can't wait to run against Prez!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yeah! We're gonna surpass Prez together, Trainer!
